message:
test(fcp-conformance): pin ZoneCheckpoint freshness SLA evaluator (pf6vc)

Add crates/fcp-conformance/tests/zone_checkpoint_sla_conformance.rs
pinning the C1.4 zone-wide revocation freshness SLA contract.

9 tests cover the NORMATIVE evaluator surface:
- 300s default — round-trips a ZoneCheckpoint through serde without
  revocation_freshness_sla_secs and verifies the serde(default)
  fallback at audit.rs:148 resolves to 300.
- Stale-at-default — age=301s with sla=300s yields Breached{1};
  Critical aborts, Risky/Safe proceed.
- Custom SLA value — explicit 60s SLA breaches at age=61.
- Exactly-at-boundary — age == sla_secs is Fresh (the gate is <=, not <)
  across {0, 1, 60, 300, 3600, u64::MAX/2}.
- Boundary+1 — age == sla_secs+1 is Breached{1} on those same SLAs.
- Future-dated checkpoint — saturating-sub forces age=0 → Fresh; no
  panic, no negative wrap; Critical proceeds under saturated state.
- Zero-second SLA — strictest gate: only age==0 Fresh, age==1 Breached{1}.
- is_fresh ⇔ Fresh variant.
- End-to-end pipeline — ZoneCheckpoint.revocation_freshness_sla_secs
  feeds into RevocationSlaChecker::new and round-trips through serde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
